sRecordable , Initializable , TypedActor , Changeable , Debuggable , DebugListener , Derivable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Moveable , Nameable public class ArrayElementAsMatrix extends Transformer Extract an element from an

ix extends Transformer Extract an element from an array by accessing the array as a matrix. This actor reads an array from the input port and sends one of its elements to the output port. The element that is extracted is determined by the x , y ,

nt that is extracted is determined by the x , y , xOffset and yOffset parameters (or port). It is required that 0 <= x * column + y * yOffset < N where N is the length of the input array, or an exception will be thrown by the fire() method. Since:

tion will be thrown by the fire() method. Since: Ptolemy II 6.1 Version: $Id: ArrayElementAsMatrix.java,v 1.5 2007/12/07 06:25:25 cxh Exp $ Author: Christopher Brooks See Also: Serialized Form Accepted Rating: Red (cxh) Proposed Rating: Red (cxh) Ne
